items.title: Veeva Systems: Unjustified Sell-Off, Justified Opportunity
items.description: Veeva Systems' migration to Vault CRM is progressing well, with new clients offsetting top-20 customer departures. Read why VEEV stock is a Buy.

items.title: Salesforce, Marvell Technology, Dollar General, Ulta Beauty, and More Stocks to Watch This Week
items.description: FEATURE  Wall Street kicks off the final month of the year with a packed slate of earnings and economic data. Earnings highlights include MongoDB and Credo Technology on Monday, followed by CrowdStrike Holdings Bank of Nova Scotia, Marvell Technology, Pure Storage, Okta GitLab, Box, Signet Jewelers, and American Eagle Outfitters on Tuesday.

items.title: Prediction: 2025's Second-Worst-Performing Dow Jones Stock Will Beat the Market in 2026
items.description: Salesforce can still be a winning long-term investment, even if it isn't the high-octane growth stock it used to be.

items.title: Powell, PCE and Other Key Thing to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets enter December facing a week packed with comprehensive economic data, high-profile earnings, and multiple Fed Chair Powell appearances that together could determine the trajectory for both the final month of 2025 and early 2026 positioning.

items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Plenty Of Earnings To Kick Off December
items.description: Salesforce, C3.ai, Marvell, Kroger, Snowflake and Dollar Tree will report. Black Friday online sales hit $11.8 billion. ChatGPT turns 3.
